creator: cordeiro@nic.br
text:
Chkrootkit 0.47 has bugs that generates false positives on FreeBSD 6.x. 
 That's why I didn't upgrade it yet.
 
 I'm working on a patch.
 
 
 
 On Friday November 10 2006 03:35, Li-Wen Hsu <Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu@lwhsu.org>> wrote:
 > 
 > >Submitter-Id:	current-users
 > >Originator:	Li-Wen Hsu
 > >Organization:	
 > >Confidential:	no 
 > >Synopsis:	[PATCH] security/chkrootkit: update to 0.47
 > >Severity:	non-critical
 > >Priority:	low
 > >Category:	ports 
 > >Class:		update
 > >Release:	FreeBSD 6.2-PRERELEASE i386
 > >Environment:
 > System: FreeBSD knight.lwhsu.ckefgisc.org 6.2-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 6.2-PRERELEASE #0: Fri Sep 29 19:45:24 CST 2006
 > >Description:
 > - Update to 0.47
 > 
 > Port maintainer (cordeiro@nic.br) is cc'd.
 > 
 > Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
 > >How-To-Repeat:
 > >Fix:
 > 
 > --- chkrootkit-0.47.patch begins here ---
 > diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/security/chkrootkit/Makefile /home/lwhsu/ports/security/chkrootkit/Makefile
 > --- /usr/ports/security/chkrootkit/Makefile	Sat May 13 12:15:00 2006
 > +++ /home/lwhsu/ports/security/chkrootkit/Makefile	Fri Nov 10 11:26:10 2006
 > @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 >  #
 >  
 >  PORTNAME=	chkrootkit
 > -PORTVERSION=	0.46a
 > +PORTVERSION=	0.47
 >  CATEGORIES=	security
 >  MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.pangeia.com.br/pub/seg/pac/ \
 >  		ftp://gd.tuwien.ac.at/infosys/security/chkrootkit/ \
 > diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/security/chkrootkit/distinfo /home/lwhsu/ports/security/chkrootkit/distinfo
 > --- /usr/ports/security/chkrootkit/distinfo	Tue Jan 24 09:02:56 2006
 > +++ /home/lwhsu/ports/security/chkrootkit/distinfo	Fri Nov 10 11:26:16 2006
 > @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 > -MD5 (chkrootkit-0.46a.tar.gz) = b73fb9e365d2edcd031d65b16e965a18
 > -SHA256 (chkrootkit-0.46a.tar.gz) = ec23b4be57e08f6c28f646a447a8545f9c612fd4b296133ac9c3c3ac13e1d696
 > -SIZE (chkrootkit-0.46a.tar.gz) = 37140
 > +MD5 (chkrootkit-0.47.tar.gz) = 4c6455d202cef35395a673386e4bf01a
 > +SHA256 (chkrootkit-0.47.tar.gz) = 5a5aeb597769cc2843648858b95fc7abd3485ba7edd1800d69e0125220c6669f
 > +SIZE (chkrootkit-0.47.tar.gz) = 37791
 > --- chkrootkit-0.47.patch ends here ---
 > 
 >
